message:
test(wave-45): add 10 pure data-type tests for codec/{lines,bytes}, grpc/health, quic_core

Cover LinesCodecError, LinesCodec, BytesCodec, ServingStatus,
HealthCheckRequest, HealthCheckResponse, QuicCoreError, ConnectionId,
and TransportParameters derive traits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
